species: ANME-2b/ANME-2a/ANME-2c archaea consortium with SRB (positive control, methane+sulfate incubation)

growth_records.strain: environmental enrichment from push core PC6, Jaco Scar seep, Costa Rica margin
growth_records.medium: Artificial seawater (ASW) medium overlaying sediment slurry (1:5 dilution)

up.method: reported (parallel positive-control AOM incubation, isotope-tracer 13C-DIC production)

growth_records.cite: Guo et al. Carbon monoxide oxidation expands the known metabolic capacity in anaerobic methanotrophic consortia. Nature Communications (2026). DOI:10.1038/s41467-026-71433-9. [PMC13079720]
growth_records.snippet: equating to approximately half the rate of methane oxidation in parallel control incubations with 13CH4 (64.63 ± 0.68 µM d−1 cm−3sed).
growth_records.notes: Canonical sulfate-coupled anaerobic oxidation of methane (AOM) rate for the same sediment/consortium, run in parallel as a positive control. Not biomass-normalized.
